question_text_snapshot: Check the automatic mechanism of door for smooth functioning.
Check all the elements of door mechanism for good condition and working like Shaft, pneumatic cylinder, LM bearings, elastic rope toothed belt, mountings and brackets
Dismantle the mechanism if not working smoothly and replace or repair the defective element.
Reassemble the mechanism and check for proper working.
Check the door flaps for bent, broken or externally damage and repair or replace the defective door flap.

Check the door flap element like inner & outer locking handle, locking pin, glass and glass frame, male & female hand safe gasket, moldings, mountings, rivets etc. for bent, broken or externally damage and repair or replace the defective element of door flap.
Check the guide rail for bent, corroded & damage. Repair or replace if required.
Check the Key locking arrangement for good condition and working.
Provide suitable lubricate on guide shaft for smooth working.
Check the automatic mechanism of door for smooth functioning.
